author: SantiMod
content:
Explorers! It’s contest time!

Tweet AI-generated pics of an environment/planet in the Star Atlas galaxy you’re most excited about!
You could win a Star Atlas Explorer Kit (Merch Kit, Fimbul Lowbies, Airbikes & more)! 

Create & tweet AI-generated pics of environments/planets in Star Atlas you’re most excited to see/visit
Follow & tag @StarAtlas, add #WeAreStarAtlas & tool used (Midjourney/Stable Diffusion/DALLE)
Number of submissions to win a Star Atlas Explorer Kit is unlimited!

More details about the contest here  
https://twitter.com/staratlas/status/1572998127296172035
https://medium.com/star-atlas/star-atlas-ai-art-contest-dbab159f61a1
